# 1955 Ford Fairlane Crown Victoria - $34,500

1955

ford crown victoria

condition:

excellent

cylinders:

8 cylinders

fuel:

gas

odometer:

58,760

title status:

clean

transmission:

https://www.google.com/maps/search/38.119647,-122.514982

Vin #: M5RW151692
This vehicle has always been stored inside and under a car cover. It is in top-notch condition, and in our opinion, ranks as a # 2 under the old cars price guide definition. If you want a car like this, you will regret missing this one.
This vehicle was purchased by the current owner on August 26, 1976. The odometer read 50,070 miles at that time. The current odometer reads 58,757. This means that the current owner has driven the car 8,687 miles in the last 49 years. That is approximately 177 miles per year. Service records are available from the original purchase date.
This vehicle has been maintained by the same mechanic in Novato, California since February, 1995.
During the time of ownership, the car won 3rd place in Silverado Concourse de Elegance in 1989, 1992, and in 1998, but not displayed since. Those ribbons are available.  The car is a V8 and was converted to 12V in 2008. The car underwent an engine rebuild in 2004.
The following items are equipped on the vehicle, power steering, standard brakes, dealer accessory bumper guards front and rear, combination spotlight – rearview mirror on driver side, rearview mirror on passenger side, fender skirts, owners manual, shop manual, seatbelts front and back, car cover, tailpipe deflectors, wide white wall, radial tires, full wheel covers, Power seat.
Requests for trades and questioning if it’s still available will be ignored.
Videos of the car running and functioning below
https://youtu.be/PPStmzc-I8E?si=h1VklCVR3RYpm_Dh
